ITEM 6. SELECTED FINANCIAL DATA
The following selected consolidated financial data should be read in conjunction with our audited consolidated financial statements and related notes thereto and with Management’s Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations, which are included elsewhere in this Form 10-K. The consolidated statement of operations data for [DATE_TIME], and the selected consolidated balance sheet data as of [DATE_TIME] are derived from, and are qualified by reference to, the audited consolidated financial statements that are included in this Form 10-K. The consolidated statement of operations data for [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME] and the consolidated balance sheet data as of [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME] are derived from audited consolidated financial statements which are not included in this Form 10-K after certain reclassifications were made to conform to the current period presentation described in Note 1 "Summary of Business and Significant Accounting Policies" of the Notes to Consolidated Financial Statements included in Part II, Item 8 of this Annual Report on Form 10-K, which is incorporated herein by reference.
The consolidated balance sheet data as of [DATE_TIME] reflects the prospective adoption of Accounting Standards Update No. [DATE_TIME], "Leases (Topic 842)" ("ASU [DATE_TIME]"), also referred to as Topic 842. The consolidated statement of operations data for [DATE_TIME], and the selected consolidated balance sheet data as of [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME] reflect the retrospective adoption of Accounting Standards Update ("ASU") [DATE_TIME], "Revenue from Contracts with Customers ("Topic 606")". Additionally, the consolidated statement of operations data for [DATE_TIME] and the selected consolidated balance sheet data as of [DATE_TIME] reflect the prospective adoption of ASU No. [DATE_TIME], "Financial Instruments-Overall (Subtopic 825-10)" ("ASU [DATE_TIME]").
(1) [DATE_TIME] income from operations includes a [SALARY] million one-time non-cash charge related to the accounting for our business combination with Salesforce.org, a related party, in which there was the settlement of the reseller agreement between the two companies.
(2) Amounts include a benefit related to the partial release of the valuation allowance of [SALARY] million, [SALARY] million, [SALARY] million, and [SALARY] million for [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME], respectively.
(3) We consider all of our marketable debt securities to be available to support current liquidity needs including those with maturity dates beyond [DATE_TIME], and therefore we classify these securities within current assets on the consolidated balance sheets. For consistency in presentation, (negative) working capital in the table above as of [DATE_TIME], [DATE_TIME] includes amounts previously reported in Marketable securities, noncurrent. In addition, other reclassifications were made to balances as of [DATE_TIME], and [DATE_TIME] to conform to the current period presentation.
(4) Amounts include noncurrent operating lease liabilities of [SALARY].4 billion for [DATE_TIME] and [SALARY] for [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME].
ITEM 7.
